text_block_list.text:
King Halo has been feeling tired, so I take her to
the infirmary and have her rest.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's not like this level of effort is enough to wear
me out, but I suppose I'll take your advice this
time...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What... Where am I?

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Oh, my liege! At long last, you've awakened!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...That's right! I am the magnificent King, the
rightful ruler of all the land!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Verily! My liege shall reign over all the lands of
Tracen as its first true king!

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hear, hear! Let us henceforth declare the
founding of our new kingdom!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: As if I need to be told. Now, listen well!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I, King, hereby declare the establishment of the
kingly kingdom of King Kingdom!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Come pay obeisance to your king!

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Followers
text_block_list.text: King! ♪ King! ♪ King Kingdom! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! Marvelous!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
My first decree is for the construction of one
hundred fashion boutiques exclusively for my
royal patronage!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Eh? Oh, I'm back...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hm... My body is light, and I feel less tired...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Why, I feel completely refreshed! I want to run
right now!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it's time to get back to training!

The rejuvenated King Halo leaves the infirmary in
high spirits.

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I bear ill tidings! The neighboring Seiun Kingdom's
army has breached our borders!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Bah, those fools... I'll smash them to bits. Ready
the troops for battle!

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But, my liege, the three of us cannot hope to
stand against an invading army of one hundred
thousand!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You mean to say it's only us three?! How can we
even call this a country?!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
What shall we do, my liege? Perhaps the enemy
will show us lenience if you apologize.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Out of the question! Just imagining Sky's
triumphant smile twists my stomach up in knots!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wait, they're already here?! If things continue like
th-this...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: King Kingdom will fall!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... What—where am I?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh... I had the most horrible dream...

Thanks to the nightmare, King Halo wakes up still
tired.
